creator: nti@w4w.net
text:
What about ports like WORDPRESS that I want to install several times on different directories with option WWWDIR ?
make install WWWDIR=/usr/local/www/webserver1 FORCE_PKG_REGISTER=YES
make install WWWDIR=/usr/local/www/webserver2 FORCE_PKG_REGISTER=YES
and so on.

Thats not possible anymore :-(
